response.justification: Bogdan possesses a highly relevant background in geospatial data platforms, having founded GISCollective, alongside strong experience in high-performance distributed systems. Although his recent professional experience heavily favors TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang over the explicitly requested modern C++ or Rust, his foundational C++ background, systems programming mindset, and deep GIS domain expertise make him a compelling candidate who can likely adapt quickly to the required stack.
strengths: Extensive domain experience in geospatial data, mapping platforms, and GIS applications.
Proven track record building high-performance, low-latency distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Strong advocate for software craftsmanship, including rigorous TDD, automated testing, and CI/CD practices.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust, which are the primary languages for the role.
Recent technical focus has been heavily oriented toward full-stack web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React).
While highly experienced in GIS, there is no explicit mention of building specific routing algorithms or navigation guidance solutions.
